concerns.text: Assumption states 'The public eye-tracking datasets referenced (e.g., OpenNeuro) contain the necessary columns' but research.md explicitly documents 'No Verified Source Found' for all required variables (fixation duration, saccade amplitude, gaze distribution, recall accuracy, valence label). The spec's data availability assumption contradicts the research findings.

Research documents a critical blocker with no verified eye-tracking dataset containing required variables, yet the plan proceeds with full pipeline implementation. The spec should either identify actual datasets or revise the research question to match available data sources.

Plan states 'Critical Constraint: Per the Verified datasets block, no verified eye-tracking dataset source exists' but does not cite the specific Verified datasets block location or reference. Add explicit citation to the verified datasets source document.
